summary: Consolidated duplicated code across Logics/ in 4 phases: extracted removeAll to shared ListHelpers.lean (4->1 definitions), consolidated Bimodal wrap/unwrap to single canonical location, replaced Temporal PropositionalHelpers with Foundations delegations (233->117 lines), delegated 10 Bimodal TemporalDerived theorems to Foundations. MCSProperties kept as-is due to FrameClass parameterization incompatibility.
